attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	ECXOOHE.HEADER_ID, ECXOOHE.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,
		ECXOOHE.CMS_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, ECXOOHE.ALIGN_FLAG,
		ECXOOHE.PROJECT_CODE, ECXOOHE.CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP,
		ECXOOHE.CSR_TEAM, ECXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE31,
		ECXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE33, ECXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE35,
		ECXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE36, ECXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE37,
		ECXOOHE.BILL_TO_DEPT, ECXOOHE.CREATION_DATE,
		ECXOOHE.CREATED_BY, ECXOOHE.CUST_PO_DATE,
		ECXOOHE.CTMP_QUOTE_NUMBER, ECXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE,
		ECXOOHE.INVOICE_PRINT_FORMAT, ECXOOHE.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		ECXOOHE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ECXOOHE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		ECXOOHE.DPAS_NUMBER, ECXOOHE.PROJECT_ID,
		ECXOOHE.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLAG, ECXOOHE.PRIME_DEAL_FLAG,
		ECXOOHE.TAXABILITY, ECXOOHE.ORDER_ORIGIN,
		ECXOOHE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, ECXOOHE.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECXOOHE.RETURN_BY_DATE, ECXOOHE.CISCO_BOOKED_DATE,
		ECXOOHE.AUTO_CANCEL_DATE, 
		ECXOOHE.FOUNDATION_FLAG,
		ECXOOHE.FAX_RECEIVED_DATE,
ECXOOHE.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY,
ECXOOHE.SVO_RMA_NUMBER,
ECXOOHE.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
ECXOOHE.CBN_IDENTIFIER /* Added as part of Sales_order changes for August QWN032,2014*/,
ECXOOHE.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_DATE/*added as part of CPE enhancemnet q2fy2015*/,
ECXOOHE.ORDER_NAME/*added as part of CPE enhancemnet q3fy2015*/
,ECXOOHE.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLAG/* Added SQF and SQT as part of  RTnR FY18 AprilRel */
,ECXOOHE.SUMMARY_QUOTE_TYPE/* Added SQF and SQT as part of  RTnR FY18 AprilRel */
,ECXOOHE.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE /* ADDED AS PART OF FLEXIBLE INVOICE */
 /* Added as part of SFP Rel */
 ,ECXOOHE.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
 ,ECXOOHE.DISTI_SO_NUMBER 
 ,ECXOOHE.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG
 ,ECXOOHE.SUB_AGENT_ID /* Added as part of ABM April Release */
 ,ECXOOHE.MASTER_AGENT_ID
 ,ECXOOHE.SUB_AGENT_NAME
 ,ECXOOHE.SOFTWARE_HYBRID_FLAG
 ,ECXOOHE.PB_INV_SCH /* Flexi Invocing */
 ,ECXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /*15 col added FY24 Nov rel*/
,ECXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,ECXOOHE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID /*15 col added FY24 dec rel*/
,ECXOOHE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE
,ECXOOHE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_WAIVER
FROM	
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDR_EXT ECXOOHE 
WHERE	NOT EXISTS (
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDR_EXT SCXOOHE 
WHERE	SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID = ECXOOHE.HEADER_ID)

SELECT 
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 				SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID 					HEADER_ID,
SCXOOHE.CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP        CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME,
SCXOOHE.CSR_TEAM 			        CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
SCXOOHE.CUST_PO_DATE				PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,
SCXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE 			SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,
SCXOOHE.CISCO_BOOKED_DATE,
SCXOOHE.FAX_RECEIVED_DATE,
SCXOOHE.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY,
USER 								EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
SCXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE31,
SCXOOHE.CBN_IDENTIFIER /* Added as part of Sales_orders changes for August QWN032,2014*/
,SCXOOHE.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLAG
,SCXOOHE.SUMMARY_QUOTE_TYPE
 /* Added as part of SFP Rel */
 ,CAST (COALESCE(SCXOOHE.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,-999) AS INTEGER) AS BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
 ,SCXOOHE.DISTI_SO_NUMBER AS DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SO_NUM
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOHE.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG, '=') AS SOLD_FOR_NET_PRICE_FLG
   /* Added as part of athena */
  ,COALESCE(SCXOOHE.ORDER_ORIGIN,'UNKNOWN') AS ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
   ,COALESCE (CASE WHEN SCXOOHE.ORDER_ORIGIN IN ('CCW-FSUB','SOWB-FSUB')  THEN GCOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
	WHEN  COALESCE (SCXOOHE.SOFTWARE_HYBRID_FLAG, 'N')='Y' THEN GCOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
	 ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
     END ,'UNKNOWN' ) AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID  
 /* END */
 /* END */ /*Added as part of ABM May Release 2021 */
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOHE.SUB_AGENT_ID,RANDOM(-1001800,-1000000)) AS SUB_AGENT_ID
 ,COALESCE(SCXOOHE.MASTER_AGENT_ID,RANDOM(-1001800,-1000000)) AS MASTER_AGENT_ID
 ,COALESCE(LKP.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN') AS BILLING_SCHEDULE_TYPE_NAME 
 ,COALESCE(LKP.ATTRIBUTE4,'UNKNOWN') AS BILLING_TERM_NAME
 ,SCXOOHE.PB_INV_SCH AS PERD_BLNG_INVC_SCHD_CREATD_FLG /* Flexi Invocing */
 ,SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /*15 col add FY24 dec rel*/
,SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID 
 /*15 col add FY24 dec rel*/
,CASE WHEN 
SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL
OR SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL
OR SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL
OR SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR
SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL
OR SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL OR SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID IS NOT NULL
OR SCXOOHE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'
END AS CR_CONTACTS_TYPE,
CAST(SCXOOHE.CREATION_DATE  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS START_TV_DTM,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM
,COALESCE(SCXOOHE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(SCXOOHE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_WAIVER ,'N') FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDR_EXT SCXOOHE
INNER JOIN 
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON
( NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
)
ON 
(SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
  /* ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL GCOOHA
 ON SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID=GCOOHA.HEADER_ID
 /* END */
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES LKP
 ON LKP.LOOKUP_CODE = SCXOOHE.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE
 AND LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXGCO_PERIODIC_BILL_SCHEDULE'
 AND LANG = 'US'
 AND ENABLED_FLAG = 'Y'                 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SCXOOHE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC)=1

SELECT	SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID, SCXOOHE.CMS_SOURCE_CODE,
		SCXOOHE.CMS_SOURCE_HEADER_ID, SCXOOHE.ALIGN_FLAG,
		SCXOOHE.PROJECT_CODE, SCXOOHE.CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP,
		SCXOOHE.CSR_TEAM, SCXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE31,
		SCXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE33, SCXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE35,
		SCXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE36, SCXOOHE.ATTRIBUTE37,
		SCXOOHE.BILL_TO_DEPT, SCXOOHE.CREATION_DATE,
		SCXOOHE.CREATED_BY, SCXOOHE.CUST_PO_DATE,
		SCXOOHE.CTMP_QUOTE_NUMBER, SCXOOHE.EXPIRATION_DATE,
		SCXOOHE.INVOICE_PRINT_FORMAT, SCXOOHE.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
		SCXOOHE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCXOOHE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
		SCXOOHE.DPAS_NUMBER, SCXOOHE.PROJECT_ID,
		SCXOOHE.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLAG, SCXOOHE.PRIME_DEAL_FLAG,
		SCXOOHE.TAXABILITY, SCXOOHE.ORDER_ORIGIN,
		SCXOOHE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, SCXOOHE.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCXOOHE.RETURN_BY_DATE, SCXOOHE.CISCO_BOOKED_DATE,
		SCXOOHE.AUTO_CANCEL_DATE, 
SCXOOHE.FOUNDATION_FLAG,
SCXOOHE.FAX_RECEIVED_DATE,
SCXOOHE.ORDER_SUBMITTED_BY,
SCXOOHE.SVO_RMA_NUMBER,
SCXOOHE.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
		'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
		SCXOOHE.CBN_IDENTIFIER/* Added as part of Sales-order changes for August QWN032,2014*/,
SCXOOHE.CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_DATE	/*added as part of CPE enhancemnet q2fy2015*/,
SCXOOHE.ORDER_NAME	/*added as part of CPE enhancemnet q3fy2015*/
,SCXOOHE.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLAG /* Added as part of  RTnR FY18 AprilRel */
,SCXOOHE.SUMMARY_QUOTE_TYPE /* Added as part of  RTnR FY18 AprilRel */
 /* Added as part of SFP Rel */
 ,SCXOOHE.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE
 ,SCXOOHE.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
 ,SCXOOHE.DISTI_SO_NUMBER 
 ,SCXOOHE.SOLD_FOR_PRICE_FLAG
 ,SCXOOHE.SUB_AGENT_ID /*Added as part of ABM March Release 2021 */
 ,SCXOOHE.MASTER_AGENT_ID
 ,SCXOOHE.SUB_AGENT_NAME
 ,SCXOOHE.SOFTWARE_HYBRID_FLAG
 ,SCXOOHE.PB_INV_SCH /* Flexi Invocing */
 ,SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID /* 15 col add FY24 dec rel*/
,SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.END_CUSTOMER_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.BILLING_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_EMAIL_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_PHONE_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_CONTACT_FAX_POINT_ID
,SCXOOHE.INSTALL_SITE_CONTACT_ID /* 15 col add FY24 dec rel*/
,SCXOOHE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_TYPE
,SCXOOHE.COMPLIANCE_PROGRAM_WAIVER
FROM	
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_HDR_EXT SCXOOHE
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT 
											WHERE SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSOT.SS_CODE  = 'CG') 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCXOOHE.HEADER_ID,SCXOOHE.GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY SCXOOHE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC)  =1
